videos.headline: Audric Estime stuns Duke crowd with 30-yard go-ahead TD
videos.description: Notre Dame takes a lead on Audric Estime's 30-yard touchdown against Duke with 31 seconds left.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Audric Estime stuns Duke crowd with 30-yard go-ahead TD) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Notre Dame fakes punt early vs. Duke
videos.description: Notre Dame fakes the punt on fourth down and converts early vs. Duke on the road.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Notre Dame fakes punt early vs. Duke) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Audric Estime rushes in for Notre Dame TD
videos.description: Notre Dame's Audric Estime dives into the end zone for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Audric Estime rushes in for Notre Dame TD) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard throws pick into Xavier Watts' hands
videos.description: Riley Leonard throws an interception into the hands of Notre Dame's Xavier Watts.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard throws pick into Xavier Watts' hands) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Mitchell Evans tips ball to himself for ridiculous catch
videos.description: Mitchell Evans tips the ball to himself and has Rece Davis excited with a beautiful catch for Notre Dame.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Mitchell Evans tips ball to himself for ridiculous catch) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard's mom reacts to her son's fumble
videos.description: After Riley Leonard loses the ball, Leonard's mom is visibly stressed.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard's mom reacts to her son's fumble) 2023/9/30

videos.headline: Jordan Waters fights off defenders on way to Duke TD
videos.description: Jordan Waters meets some resistance and fights off Notre Dame defenders for the touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Waters fights off defenders on way to Duke TD) 2023/9/30

videos.headline: Blue Devils stop Notre Dame on crucial 3rd down
videos.description: Duke gets the ball back from Notre Dame after forcing a three-and-out late in the third quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Blue Devils stop Notre Dame on crucial 3rd down) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard finds Jordan Moore for Duke TD to take lead
videos.description: Duke takes the lead over Notre Dame as Riley Leonard finds a wide open Jordan Moore waiting in the end zone.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard finds Jordan Moore for Duke TD to take lead) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Riley Leonard pins Notre Dame deep in its own end with nice pooch punt
videos.description: Riley Leonard drop-kicks the ball inside the 5-yard line for Duke.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Riley Leonard pins Notre Dame deep in its own end with nice pooch punt) 2023/9/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sam Hartman waits to check on Riley Leonard after injury
videos.description: Sam Hartman waits for Riley Leonard outside the medical tent after the Duke quarterback suffered an injury late in Notre Dame's win.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sam Hartman waits to check on Riley Leonard after injury) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
